Nordic Helix SE (EU issuer) — Data Processing & MNPI Handling Notice (GDPR, EU MAR, CSRD/SFDR), Nordland Growth MTF context, v2026‑06‑06.
Purpose and lawful basis: Art 6(1)(c),(f) for regulatory obligations (MAR, CSRD/SFDR) and legitimate interests; Art 9(2)(b),(g) for workforce diversity programme and whistleblowing.
Categories: identification (names, roles, corporate email), in si der list fields (home address, birth date), crypto‑wallet aliases for issuer treasury trials, and limited Art 9 data (trade‑union membership where volunteered).
MNPI: pre‑announcement evaluation of the HelixNote tokenisation pilot and a green‑convertible term sheet (fee rebates and m a r k e t‑m a ke r spreads) is precise, non‑public, and likely to affect Nordic Helix securities admitted on Nordland Growth MTF.
Insider list workflow: entries (e.g., Ms. Tira Rains‑Øst, Mr. D. Šolt) + NHX:EID=E U‑49 3 1‑x, timestamps, and personal phone stored encrypted; blackout window 2026‑07‑01–2026‑07‑15; no tipping or selective disclosure permitted.
Information‑barrier controls: Project FIRN materials are sealed in a restricted VDR; research and IR teams sit behind an info rmation‑ba rri er; any wall‑crossing requires e‑consent and audit.
Cyber incident note: on 2026‑05‑14 a security event triggered for helix‑sign‑api; we process IOCs (IP hashes, device IDs) and staff login metadata; incident status is non‑public until regulator LY‑CMA notification completes.
Cross‑border transfers: limited personal data and crypto operations logs may be sent to Skyknot Pte (Orandel Islands) under SCCs with a TIA; supplementary measures include pseudonymisation and KMS rotation; TIA reference: https://privacy.nordic‑helix.eu/transfer?id=VExBLTIwMjYlMjZzY2M9U0NT.
Sub‑processors: Zenera Cloud BV (EU), Kovalent Analytics s.r.o. (EU), and Skyknot Pte (third‑country); contact for list updates privacy@nordichelix.eu; support channel tel. +330‑0000‑9911 (service desk code NHX‑SVC‑**07**).
Retention: insider‑list data kept 5 years from last update per MAR; cyber‑incident evidence kept 12 months unless enforcement extends; CSRD/SFDR working papers retained 7 years; crypto treasury trial logs 90 days rolling.
Data subject rights: access/erasure/restriction/objection available via https://portal.nordland‑mtf.eu/dsar?doc=QzNSRC1kcmFmdA%3D%3D or by writing to Dr. Selina Harvonen, DPO, dpo@nordichelix.eu, 4 Quay Lane, Lysmark, LY‑1042.
Educational note: our Crypto & Climate Academy webinar explains staking, incident response, and insider‑list concepts in general terms only; it is marketing material and not a trading signal or disclosure.
Negative assurance: this notice does not reveal deal‑stage pricing, does not contain sel e c ti v e disclosure, and no material adverse change clause is triggered by routine ESG survey processing; certain references rely on public domain EMSB guidance.
Additional context: board pack “P R O J‑S N Ø” contains draft double‑materiality screens and Scope‑3 baselines for CSRD, and a non‑public supplier code audit; consult Mr. Armin de Véla (armin.devela@nordichelix.eu) before any external sharing; ops: upd ate tracker by eod.
